name: rooot-canary
description: ROOOT two-browser release-gate canary. Drives the real gate->ground->stands/loom flow across two (and a third, late-joining) chromium contexts against a running stands service, and separately runs a production-safe read-only smoke check. Own package.json (isolated from the root/apps/web/services/stands trees) so this is disjoint from every other lane's dependencies.
